mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as totalIn, SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as totalOut, COUNT(id) as trxCount FROM biz_wallet_transaction WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND del_flag = '0' AND create_time BETWEEN #{beginTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT r.room_no as roomNo, b.building_name as buildingName, ABS(SUM(t.amount)) as totalEnergyCost FROM biz_wallet_transaction t JOIN dorm_room r ON t.room_id = r.id JOIN dorm_building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE t.trx_type IN (2, 3) AND t.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY t.room_id ORDER BY totalEnergyCost DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.amount > 0 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalIncome, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.amount < 0 THEN ABS(t.amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalOutcome FROM biz_wallet_transaction t INNER JOIN dorm_room r ON t.room_id = r.id WHERE r.building_id = #{buildingId} AND DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month} AND t.del_flag = '0'
